title: Account of Badr by Ibn Ishaq
description: According to Ibn Humayd-Salamah-Muhammad b. Ishaq:67 The Messenger of God heard that Abu Sufyan b. I;Iarb was coming from Syria in a great caravan belonging to Quraysh containing money and merchandise of theirs and including thirty or forty horsemen of Quraysh, among them Makhramah b. Nawfal b. 65. The Prophet 's uncle.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
